data.name: Love x Fantasy: Lusty Succubus
data.detailed_description:
Continuing the story from the previous game, Love x Fantasy: Lusty Succubus follows your desperate attempt to escape a relentless succubus—while uncovering the truth behind her origins and the grudge she holds against you.

Core gameplay loop: explore a branching dungeon, survive deadly encounters, and unlock the next path by clearing a bubble-match puzzle. Your progress and choices determine what scenes you unlock.

Gameplay

  • Defense Rooms (Survival): hold your ground and survive waves of monsters. Defeat enemies, stay alive, and push forward deeper into the dungeon.

  • Door Unlock Puzzle (Bubble Match): between battles, you’ll unlock doors by clearing a relaxing bubble puzzle—match bubbles of the same color to reach the required score and complete the stage.

  • Choices & Rewards: your decisions during the story and encounters unlock hot scenes, which can be replayed anytime in the Gallery.

Features

  • Over 30 beautifully animated HD CGs with detailed artwork

  • Gameplay that alternates between wave-based defense rooms and bubble-match door puzzles

  • Unlock hot scenes through your choices

  • Gallery Mode to store and rewatch unlocked scenes

  • An immersive fantasy soundtrack that draws you into the world

data.short_description: Love x Fantasy: Lusty Succubus follows your desperate attempt to escape from the pursuing succubus while uncovering the truth behind her origins and the grudge she holds against you.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
